headings.text: Boat Ceramic Coating & PPF in Denver, CO – Ultimate Marine Protection
Serving THE Denver Metro And surrounding areas
Shield your boat from Colorado’s harsh elements with professional ceramic coating and paint protection film (PPF) services
Why Choose Front Range Detail Studio?
SunTek Reaction Paint Protection Film (PPF) for Boats
How long does marine ceramic coating last?
Can you apply PPF to a boat?
Do you offer seasonal boat services?
Denver's 1st Choice in Paint Protection Film and Clear Bra
Front Range Detail Studio client Reviews

paragraphs: At Front Range Detail Studio, we specialize in applying System X Marine Ceramic Coatings and SunTek Reaction PPF—offering unparalleled defense against UV rays, oxidation, scratches, and water damage.
Our team is factory-trained to apply System X Marine Ceramic Coatings and SunTek Reaction PPF for unmatched results.
From buffing and annual waxing to interior detailing and clear film installation, we deliver total care for your boat.
We customize every package to your vessel and boating lifestyle, ensuring the best protection and gloss.
We begin with a deep cleaning to remove algae, grime, and contaminants from the boat’s surface.
Any oxidation, scratches, or imperfections are corrected to ensure a flawless base before coating.
System X Marine Ceramic Coating is carefully applied to all designated surfaces, creating a hydrophobic, UV-resistant barrier.
The coating is allowed to cure, followed by a detailed inspection to ensure complete coverage and a perfect finish.
Protect your boat with the industry’s leading marine ceramic.
SunTek Reaction PPF offers a 12-year warranty against yellowing, cracking, and peeling—even in harsh marine environments.

Our full suite of marine ceramic coating services covers everything from hull-only applications to complete interior and exterior protection packages. We use System X Marine Ceramic Coatings exclusively, ensuring professional-grade results backed by manufacturer warranties.
Gelcoat-safe, high-quality wax applied after buffing. Shields your boat from Colorado’s intense sun and water spots. Recommended every 12 months for best results. Call for more details.
Vacuum and deep clean all seating, carpets, and upholstery. Vinyl and leather cleaning and conditioning. Mold and mildew treatment. Glass and mirror cleaning. Dashboard and control panel detailing.
System X Marine coatings carry a 3-year warranty on new boats with annual top coat maintenance required to maintain coverage.
Yes — SunTek Reaction PPF protects hull leading edges, swim platforms, boarding steps and any high-wear gelcoat or painted areas.
Yes, boat ceramic coating and detailing services are available by appointment during the boating season.
Pair ceramic coating with our full boat detailing services for complete protection inside and out.

Preserve the pristine condition of your vehicle with our high-quality Paint Protection Film, or Clear Bra. Our warranty backed PPF acts as an invisible shield, guarding your car's paint against scratches, stone chips, and road debris. With advanced self-healing technology and ceramic coating, your vehicle stays looking brand new. Protect your investment with our expert application.

“Same day service. Excellent and professional service. My RV is 7 years old and just completed a 1500 mile journey Covered in dust, dirt and bug covered windshield Sam cleaned everything and made it look brand new and shiny. I'm very happy with the results.”
— Geri P.

“Brought 10 year old Navion motorhome to Sam for wash, polish and wax job. The quality of workmanship performed by Sam and crew was simply outstanding. We are more than pleased with the results. This is the best RV detailing service I've ever used...”
— TG G.

“We used Front Range Mobile Detailing to detail the exterior of our 20+ year old boat...it looks new. The service specifically was boat oxidation removal and buffing. Sam is very responsive and communicated through the whole process...”
— Cindy T.
“Front range did an excellent job on our 5th wheel & F350! Sam was extremely knowledgeable and explained how he only uses top line products. His team brought the brand new shine back!”
— Alyson W.

“I have nothing but good things to say about Front Range Detail Studio. Impeccable work, driven by attention to detail and obvious care for their customers. Experts at ceramic coating and maintenance. And we just added clear bra to the mix, and they did an excellent job with the applications. Very trusting of these guys with my CT5-V. Trust them as well, you won't be disappointed.”
— Steve E.

“On Point!!! Communication, Quality, Customer Service... All 5 star. I needed to get my truck ready to sell asap. I was wanting the full package, all the stuff. Dirty truck thats seen some miles and some roads. Honesty! They told me that I didn't need all the extras and gave me a detailed explanation and a package that would suffice for a great price.”
— Alex

“My experience started out looking for ceramic coating and thankfully Front Range Detail came up. It has the most 5 star reviews and I am another 5 star for them. The 1st thing that stood out to me was when we did the walk around my vehicle, they didn't try to up sell me...”

“We recently bought a new Jayco Class A Motorhome and wanted to ensure its bodywork stays in tip-top condition as long as possible. We engaged Sam and his team over 12 months ago to apply a ceramic coating and then regularly maintain and clean it since. They have done an amazing job and the unit still looks like it rolled off the assembly line yesterday despite Colorado weather and the miles.”
— Dean P.

mainEntity.name: How long does marine ceramic coating last?

acceptedAnswer.text: System X Marine coatings carry a 3-year warranty on new boats with annual top coat maintenance required to maintain coverage.

mainEntity.name: Can you apply PPF to a boat?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — SunTek Reaction PPF protects hull leading edges, swim platforms, boarding steps and any high-wear gelcoat or painted areas.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer seasonal boat services?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, boat ceramic coating and detailing services are available by appointment during the boating season.
